notes: Captures only show discovery/browse endpoints (/api/config/, /api/v1/characters:search/, /api/v1/characters:getTrendingCharacters/, /api/v1/characters/{id}/reviews/) and an auth-protected user endpoint (/api/v1/users/me/characters/). No chat send/stream endpoints or websocket traffic captured, so chat replay plan cannot be completed from evidence. /api/config/ advertises CENTRIFUGO_URL=wss://charclub.ahihoapis.com, suggesting realtime chat may use Centrifugo websockets, but this was not observed. Redirect pattern: many /api/... endpoints 308 to trailing-slash variant.
